title: Click Extraction Engine Log — Phase 19 Daily Jun 11

fixes.old: $3,000 2-Year 24% APR Loan Calculator 2026 — Free Monthly Payment Tool
fixes.rationale: Curiosity hook. Removes 'Free Monthly Payment Tool' which gives away value prop. Forces click to see actual payment.

fixes.old: See your exact monthly payment, total interest, and amortization schedule.
fixes.new: Find out YOUR exact monthly payment... See amortization schedule, total interest, and compare different terms.
fixes.rationale: Curiosity hook. Removes 'see your exact' which implies answer is in snippet.

fixes.old: Free mortgage calculator for a $X home. See your exact monthly payment...
fixes.new: What's YOUR monthly payment for a $X home? Get a personalized calculation in 30 seconds.
fixes.rationale: Question format forces click. 'Free mortgage calculator' too generic.

fixes.old: Calculate the total return... with a final value of $X. See CAGR...
fixes.new: Calculate YOUR exact investment return... See CAGR, absolute return, annualized performance, and compare against benchmarks.
fixes.rationale: Removed finalValue reveal which kills click intent.

fixes.old: Calculate compound interest on $X at Y% APY over Z years. See the power of compound growth...
fixes.new: How much will $X grow at Y% APY over Z years? See YOUR personalized compound growth projection...
fixes.rationale: Question format. 'See YOUR' personalized vs generic 'See the power'.

note: All 5 fixes are TEMPLATE-LEVEL — they apply to all 500+ tool variant pages at once. This is the Phase 19 pattern (Phase 19 applied same pattern for mortgage, compound, and investment titles on Jun 10). Today completes the fix for loan templates.
